name: Fantasy Wallpapers
shortDescription: Epic kingdoms, dragons, and mythic scenes for cinematic desktops and phones.
description: Explore AI-crafted fantasy wallpapers with towering castles, ancient forests, glowing magic, and heroic silhouettes designed for premium desktop and mobile displays.
intro: Fantasy wallpapers blend scale, mood, and worldbuilding. Browse rich scenes built for crisp screens, atmospheric lighting, and clean wallpaper composition.

name: Dark Fantasy Wallpapers
shortDescription: Brooding ruins, cursed landscapes, and mythic shadows with premium contrast.
description: Discover dark fantasy wallpapers featuring ruined thrones, moonlit cathedrals, spectral warriors, and ominous skies with dramatic cinematic depth.
intro: Dark fantasy wallpapers focus on tension, atmosphere, and contrast. Expect moody palettes, ruined architecture, and haunting light built for immersive backgrounds.

name: Cyberpunk Wallpapers
shortDescription: Neon skylines, electric rain, and futuristic streets rendered for modern screens.
description: Browse cyberpunk wallpapers with glowing megacities, rainy alleyways, augmented heroes, and high-contrast neon scenes tailored for 4K and mobile devices.
intro: Cyberpunk wallpapers lean into electric color, dense city detail, and polished tech-noir framing for standout desktop and phone setups.

name: Space Wallpapers
shortDescription: Galaxies, nebulas, and cosmic horizons with sharp detail and cinematic scale.
description: Find space wallpapers packed with orbiting worlds, luminous nebula clouds, astronaut silhouettes, and expansive deep-space color for premium backgrounds.
intro: Space wallpapers emphasize scale, clean composition, and vivid cosmic lighting that works beautifully across ultrawide monitors and mobile screens.

name: Gaming Wallpapers
shortDescription: High-energy worlds, competitive vibes, and stylized action scenes for setups.
description: Browse gaming wallpapers inspired by fantasy quests, sci-fi battlegrounds, esports lighting, and stylized character scenes made for immersive setups.
intro: Gaming wallpapers combine character-driven compositions, strong silhouettes, and punchy lighting for desktop battlestations and mobile lock screens.

name: Mobile Wallpapers
shortDescription: Portrait-first AI wallpapers tuned for lock screens and high-contrast mobile displays.
description: Explore mobile wallpapers with vertical compositions, sharp focal points, and polished gradients optimized for modern phones and OLED displays.
intro: Mobile wallpapers prioritize vertical balance, negative space for widgets, and crisp detail that still feels premium on smaller screens.
